params.name: Black Dragon Key
params.description: Since the last Rezero War, the fallen tribe of Black Dragon has been hiding in the underground world. It is said that they have built a huge Dragon City there, and only those with the key can find the entrance to the city.
params.ss1:
Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail ATK +10
Dragon Form Tiers: 9/9

Dragon Form Tiers: 9/9
params.ss3:
